accounts.signal: OSC-registered EMD · $51.9M Winnipeg CRE on Polymesh · CSA Project Tokenization
accounts.subject: Issuance proof before Collaboratory — question for Ocree?
accounts.body:
Hi Anne,

With Ocree's Winnipeg CRE issuance on Polymesh, CSA Collaboratory-style reviews usually end up on a very specific question: not whether tokenization works, but whether each issuance step can be proven as permitted after the fact.

That gap is where we've been focusing at TrustField — producing a step-by-step replay of regulated workflows so an external reviewer can reconstruct what actually happened, not just what was intended.

Curious if that's something your team is already preparing for ahead of the live tests, or still something being defined?

If useful — quick end-to-end replay example:
https://www.trustfield.ca/start

Sina Kazemnezhad · TrustField Technologies
hello@trustfield.ca · Canada
Reply **stop** — no further messages.
accounts.attach: Trust Brief · T-P6 partner attestation outline
accounts.fintrac_note: OSC EMD — verify exempt market dealer registration
